body:
NEW: Get your Official Trump Pence Tumbler now. |
[](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/eceba11oQEZS6CFgWgaBFFcDRMN6aaaaCKKdBMDTH49a?q=5@zAw9w&i=Ztsmhpew2~_cqWmh.gkq&h=g&t=&v=x5y-x-6xnyit6xqqXpav6hfCfjYCpCpCdj6i65&pCp)

Friend,

Every Trump supporter you know is going to want this:

[](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/eceba11oQEZS6CFgWgaBFFcDRMN6aaaaCKKdBMDTH49a?q=5@zAw9w&i=Ztsmhpew2~_cqWmh.gkq&h=j&t=&v=x5y-x-6xnyit6xqqXpav6hfCfjYCpCpCdj6i65&pCp)
[**Beat the rush and get your Official Trump Pence Tumbler now for $25.**](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/eceba11oQEZS6CFgWgaBFFcDRMN6aaaaCKKdBMDTH49a?q=5@zAw9w&i=Ztsmhpew2~_cqWmh.gkq&h=f&t=&v=x5y-x-6xnyit6xqqXpav6hfCfjYCpCpCdj6i65&pCp)

This tumbler is the perfect stocking stuffer and is only available at the Official Store for Trump Gear.

**Don 't wait! Limited stock available!**

[**Get the Official Trump Pence Tumbler now while supplies last.**](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/eceba11oQEZS6CFgWgaBFFcDRMN6aaaaCKKdBMDTH49a?q=5@zAw9w&i=Ztsmhpew2~_cqWmh.gkq&h=h&t=&v=x5y-x-6xnyit6xqqXpav6hfCfjYCpCpCdj6i65&pCp)

Thanks,

[](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/eceba11oQEZS6CFgWgaBFFcDRMN6aaaaCKKdBMDTH49a?q=5@zAw9w&i=Ztsmhpew2~_cqWmh.gkq&h=j&t=&v=x5y-x-6xnyit6xqqXpav6hfCfjYCpCpCdj6i65&pCp)

Alex
Trump Store Manager

****[I WANT A TUMBLER](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/eceba11oQEZS6CFgWgaBFFcDRMN6aaaaCKKdBMDTH49a?q=5@zAw9w&i=Ztsmhpew2~_cqWmh.gkq&h=i&t=&v=x5y-x-6xnyit6xqqXpav6hfCfjYCpCpCdj6i65&pCp)****

name: Jessica O'Connell, EMILY's List
subject: Always fighting for what you believe in >>
body:
| [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c763b/24c69fd9/36a66f5/18ec00bc/4252699896/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WPEFEW35N_digital_email_20161126_Recurring_n-all&source=WPEFEW35N_digital_email_20161126_Recurring_n-all")
---

| | Peter,

Some of this year's election results could easily make people cynical -- but this community isn't backing down.

Here's what continues to give me hope: The outpouring of support EMILY's List has seen in the past few weeks. People are donating, calling in to the main office, and asking what they can do to help.

One thing that knocked my socks off: The more than 2,000 people who've signed up to make a monthly donation to EMILY's List since Election Day.

We need that support more than ever as we push back on the Republican-controlled Congress and Donald Trump in the White House.

**[If you want to be part of that work, sign up to become a monthly donor to EMILY's List. No matter how large or small your gift, it's a meaningful way to make sure we can fight back.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c763b/24c69fd9/36a66f5/18ec00bd/4252699896/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161123_email_Recurringask?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+If+you+want+to+be+part+of+that+work+sign&utm_campaign=WPEFEW35N_digital_email_20161126_Recurring_n-all&source=WPEFEW35N_digital_email_20161126_Recurring_n-all")**

Clicking the checkbox at the bottom of the donation form that says "Yes, I would like this to be a monthly gift" is simple, but it means a lot.

When we have consistent monthly donations, we can promise candidates the early resources they need. We can invest in more research on how best to reach voters. We can train more staff to help our campaigns run smoothly.

And all of that helps us keep building on the progress we've made.

A small monthly donation is one of the best ways you can make sure you're always fighting for the things you believe in.

**Invest in helping elect more pro-choice Democratic women to office. Become an EMILY's List monthly donor today:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Maximize-Your-Impact](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c763b/24c69fd9/36a66f5/18ec00be/4252699896/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161123_email_Recurringask?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgMaximizeYourImpa&utm_campaign=WPEFEW35N_digital_email_20161126_Recurring_n-all&source=WPEFEW35N_digital_email_20161126_Recurring_n-all")**

Thank you,

Jessica O'Connell
Executive Director, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c763b/24c69fd9/36a66f5/18ec00bf/4252699896/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161123_email_Recurringask?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WPEFEW35N_digital_email_20161126_Recurring_n-all&source=WPEFEW35N_digital_email_20161126_Recurring_n-all")

|
---|---|---
# EMILY's List is a community of over three million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.

|
---
Paid for by EMILY's List [www.emilyslist.org](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c763b/24c69fd9/36a66f5/18ec00b8/4252699896/VEsD/ "http://www.emilyslist.org/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=5+-+wwwemilyslistorg&utm_campaign=WPEFEW35N_digital_email_20161126_Recurring_n-all&source=WPEFEW35N_digital_email_20161126_Recurring_n-all") and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
1800 M Street NW, Suite 375N, Washington, DC 20036 Thank you for being a supporter of EMILY's List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c763b/24c69fd9/36a66f5/18ec00b9/4252699896/VEsA/ "http://action.emilyslist.org/page/s/less-email-private-bc?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=WPEFEW35N_digital_email_20161126_Recurring_n-all&source=WPEFEW35N_digital_email_20161126_Recurring_n-all"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c763b/24c69fd9/36a66f5/18ec00ba/4252699896/VEsB/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=WPEFEW35N_digital_email_20161126_Recurring_n-all&source=WPEFEW35N_digital_email_20161126_Recurring_n-all"). Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at [information@emilyslist.org](mailto:information@emilyslist.org) or simply reply to this email.

Contributions or gifts to EMILY's List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible.
